_comment: Railway template configuration as code for hermes-station.
AUTHORITATIVE SCHEMA. Field names below match Railway's serializedConfig
as returned by the public GraphQL endpoint:
DELTAS FROM THE LIVE PUBLISHED TEMPLATE (apply via dashboard):
1. OPENROUTER_API_KEY: drop the trailing-space typo in the variable name.
2. OPENROUTER_API_KEY: set isOptional=true; the seeder makes it bootstrap
the provider when present, and warn-and-continue handles its absence.
surfaces the deployed git SHA on Railway template deploys.
4. Add a service domain so a *.up.railway.app URL is auto-provisioned.
REPUBLISH WORKFLOW: open the template in Railway's dashboard, paste this
JSON into the Project Config import field, save, then publish a new version.
Service IDs are stable across edits — preserve the existing UUIDs.

HERMES_ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the /admin dashboard. Pick a strong value; rotate by updating this variable and redeploying.

HERMES_WEBUI_PASSWORD.description: Password for the WebUI (end-user chat) login.

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: Optional: when set, the first-boot seeder configures OpenRouter as the provider so the agent works immediately. Skip to configure the provider via the FIRST RUN wizard or /admin after deploy.

HERMES_GATEWAY_AUTOSTART.description: When to start the gateway. 'auto' (default): start when a provider is configured. 'true'/'1': always start. 'false'/'0': manual start only via /admin.
